Name: OrganizationIdType_CS
Title: Organization Id Type CS
Description: Id types used to identify organizations.

Name: PersonIdType_CS
Title: Person Id Type CS
Description: Id types used to identify persons involved, other than the patient.

Name: PublicIdType_CS
Title: Public Id Type CS
Description: Id types used to identify patients

Name: FHIRDeviceAvailabilityStatus
Title: FHIR Device Availability Status
Description: The record status of the device.

Name: FHIRDeviceCategory
Title: FHIR Device Category
Description: The category of the device.

Name: DeviceNameType
Title: Device Name Type
Description: The type of name the device is referred by.

Name: FHIRDeviceOperationMode
Title: FHIR Device Operation Mode
Description: The operation mode of the device.

Name: FHIRDeviceSpecializationCategory
Title: FHIR Device Specialization Category
Description: The kind of standards used by the device.

Name: FHIRDeviceStatus
Title: FHIR Device Status
Description: The status of the Device record.

Name: FHIRTypes
Title: All FHIR Types
Description: One of the types defined as part of this version of FHIR.

Name: IdentifierUse
Title: IdentifierUse
Description: Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

Name: RequestIntent
Title: RequestIntent
Description: Codes indicating the degree of authority/intentionality associated with a request.

Name: RequestPriority
Title: RequestPriority
Description: Identifies the level of importance to be assigned to actioning the request.

Name: RequestStatus
Title: RequestStatus
Description: Codes identifying the lifecycle stage of a request.

Name: ServiceMode
Title: Service Mode
Description: An example set of Service Modes that could be applicable to use to characterize HealthcareServices or PractitionerRoles while searching

Name: ServiceRequestOrderDetailParameterCode
Title: Service Request Order Detail Parameter Code
Description: Codes providing the parameter codes for service request details.

Name: SpecimenCombined
Title: Specimen Combined
Description: Codes providing the combined status of the specimen.

Name: SpecimenRole
Title: Specimen Role
Description: Codes providing the combined status of the specimen.

Name: SpecimenStatus
Title: Specimen Status
Description: Codes providing the status/availability of a specimen.

Name: UDIEntryType
Title: UDI Entry Type
Description: Codes to identify how UDI data was entered.

Name: PractitionerRole
Title: Practitioner role
Description: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the role of a Practitioner.

Name: IdentifierType
Title: identifierType
Description: HL7-defined code system of concepts specifying type of identifier. Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging data types CX, PLN, PPN, XCN and XON.

Name: SpecimenCondition
Title: specimenCondition
Description: Code system of concepts specifying a mode or state of being that describes the nature of the specimen.  Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in the SPM segment.

Name: RelevantClincialInformation
Title: relevantClincialInformation
Description: Code system of concepts specifying additional clinical information about the patient or specimen to report the supporting and/or suspected diagnosis and clinical findings on requests for interpreted diagnostic studies. Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in the OBR segment.

Name: RoleCode
Title: RoleCode
Description: A set of codes further specifying the kind of Role; specific classification codes for further qualifying RoleClass codes.
